NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​AppCastHelper
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​AppCastHelper

The AppCastHelper class is responsible for downloading app cast data, downloading and checking app cast signature data, and filtering app cast items when looking for available updates.

Variables
_installedVersion
private string? _installedVersion
_castUrl
private string? _castUrl
_signatureVerifier
private ISignatureVerifier? _signatureVerifier
_logWriter
private ILogger? _logWriter
_dataDownloader
private IAppCastDataDownloader? _dataDownloader
Properties
SignatureFileExtension
public string SignatureFileExtension {
get;
set
}

Extension (WITHOUT the "." at the start) for the signature file. Defaults to "signature".

AppCastFilter
public IAppCastFilter? AppCastFilter {
get;
set
}

An optional filtering component. Use this to manually filter items for custom channels (e.g. beta or alpha) or run your own logic on getting rid of older versions.  NOTE: When you use this interface with , you must filter out old versions of yourself if you want that to happen! In other words,  skips this step when there is an  implementation available.  Note that items will still be filtered based on OS and signature information as necessary. You don't need to handle that.

FilterOutItemsWithNoVersion
public bool FilterOutItemsWithNoVersion {
get;
set
}

When filtering for available updates, remove items with no version information set.

FilterOutItemsWithNoDownloadLink
public bool FilterOutItemsWithNoDownloadLink {
get;
set
}

When filtering for available updates, remove items with no download link set.

Functions
AppCastHelper
public AppCastHelper()

Create a new object with an empty list of  items

SetupAppCastHelper
public virtual void SetupAppCastHelper(
IAppCastDataDownloader 
dataDownloader,
string 
castUrl,
string? 
installedVersion,
ISignatureVerifier? 
signatureVerifier,
ILogger? 
logWriter
= 
null
)

Setup the app cast handler info for downloading and parsing app cast information

Parameters
dataDownloader
IAppCastDataDownloader

downloader that will manage the app cast download (provided by SparkleUpdater via the SparkleUpdater.AppCastDataDownloader property.

castUrl
string

full URL to the app cast file

installedVersion
string?

installed version of the software

signatureVerifier
ISignatureVerifier?

Object to check signatures of app cast information

logWriter
ILogger?

object that you can utilize to do any necessary logging

CheckSetupCalled
private void CheckSetupCalled()
IsSignatureNeeded
private bool IsSignatureNeeded()
DownloadSignatureData
private async Task<string?> DownloadSignatureData(
string 
appCastUrl,
string 
signatureExtension
)
DownloadAppCast
public virtual async Task<string?> DownloadAppCast()

Downloads an app cast from the app cast URL sent to SetupAppCastHelper and verifies its signature (if signatures are required for app casts).  Configure functionality by implementing your own or by overriding this method in a subclass.

Returns

Downloaded app cast raw string if download and verification succeeded. Null if the operation failed somehow.

VerifyAppCast
protected bool VerifyAppCast(
string? 
appCast,
string? 
signature
)

Verify a given app cast string based on a given cryptographic signature.  Verified via the  sent to SetupAppCastHelper.

Parameters
appCast
string?

App cast string to verify

signature
string?

Signature of app cast

Returns

True if signature is not required OR required and valid; false otherwise

FilterUpdates
public virtual List<AppCastItem> FilterUpdates(
List<AppCastItem> 
items
)

Returns filtered list of updates between current installed version and latest version.  By default, checks operating system (always does this no matter what unless this function is overriden), whether or not signatures are available (if signatures are required), and version of the software (filters out anything that is the same version or older).  Adjust behavior via the  and  bool properties,  (NOTE: if you use this, you will need to handle filtering out items that are older than the user's current version), or override this method in a subclass.

Parameter
items
List<AppCastItem>

List of  items to filter

Returns

A list of filtered  updates that could be installed

FilterAppCastItem
protected FilterItemResult FilterAppCastItem(
SemVerLike 
installed,
bool 
discardVersionsSmallerThanInstalled,
bool 
signatureNeeded,
AppCastItem 
item
)

Check if an AppCastItem update is valid, according to platform, signature requirements and current installed version number.  In the case where your app implements a downgrade strategy, e.g. when switching from a beta to a stable channel - there has to be a way to tell the update mechanism that you wish to ignore the beta AppCastItem elements, and that the latest stable element should be installed.

Parameters
installed
SemVerLike

the currently installed Version

discardVersionsSmallerThanInstalled
bool

if true, and the item's version is less than or equal to installed - the item will be discarded

signatureNeeded
bool

whether or not a signature is required

item
AppCastItem

the AppCastItem under consideration, every AppCastItem found in the appcast.xml file is presented to this function once

Returns

FilterItemResult.Valid if the AppCastItem should be considered as a valid target for installation.

FilterAppCastItemByOS
protected FilterItemResult FilterAppCastItemByOS(
AppCastItem 
item
)

Check if an AppCastItem update is valid based on operating system. The user's current operating system needs to match the operating system of the AppCastItem for the AppCastItem to be valid.

Parameter
item
AppCastItem

the AppCastItem under consideration

Returns

FilterItemResult.Valid if the AppCastItem should be considered as a valid target for installation; FilterItemResult.NotThisPlatform otherwise.
